subject: [PATCH 2/8] mm: use zone lock guard in unset_migratetype_isolate()

reviews.author: Dmitry Ilvokhin
reviews.summary: The patch series introduces a new scope-based cleanup mechanism to simplify zone lock handling in the mm code.

2026-03-18.patch_summary: This patch series aims to simplify the zone lock handling in the mm code by introducing a scope-based cleanup mechanism, replacing explicit lock/unlock patterns and goto statements.
